testcase.name: setUp

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Expected browser binary location, but unable to find binary in default location, no 'moz:firefoxOptions.binary' capability provided, and no binary flag set on the command line Host info: host: 'LTIN718517', ip: '10.232.23.177' Build info: version: '4.14.1', revision: '03f8ede370' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, moz:debuggerAddress: true, moz:firefoxOptions: {}}]}]
